name: reaction-maya-bedtime
hook_caption: I PLAYED HER A STORY WITH HER NAME IN IT
voiceover: Tonight's story is hers. Hers alone. The hero is... Maya.
walkthrough_hook: I MADE HER ONE OF THESE IN 60 SECONDS
walkthrough_voiceover: Five questions. Sixty seconds. A story made by hand, with her name woven through. Then... watch what happens. Tonight's story is hers. Hers alone. The hero is... Maya.
story_passage: Maya found the drawer on a Tuesday afternoon, the kind of Tuesday where something new is bound to happen. Inside, beneath a tangle of string and old buttons, was a map drawn in careful blue ink with one word at the top: Maya. Her cousin Leo crowded in to look. "That's your name," he whispered. And the map, as if hearing them, gave the smallest shiver.
kid_image_prompt: Close editorial photograph of a 5-year-old girl in pyjamas listening to a phone, tucked into a knitted blanket, eyes wide with surprise then breaking into a small smile, late evening lamp light, slight grain, Portra 400, vertical 9:16, head and shoulders only.

end_card.headline: A story that knows their name.
